jury_reasoning.hypothesis: Larger time embedding provides richer timestep information, allowing the denoiser to better distinguish between noise levels. Synergizes with DDIM sampling by providing finer-step control.
jury_reasoning.mechanism: Changed time_dim default from 32 to 64 in ConditionalDenoiser.

git.commit_message: pipeline: time_series_expert — Increase time embedding dim 32→64
